creator: peter@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 173151
Update to 1.13.0 + rc.d + sample files

I'm aware of PR#211336 which is an update to 1.13.0.  I'm using an updated version as well and added an rc.d script for nghttpx and a sample config file.

Could you please update it?  Sample rc.d scripts would be appreciated.  I'm sure the one I added in my version of the update patch needs work but it seems to work.
